================================================================================
P0 ACTIVE TRIGGER - TEST 002: HIGH BROADCAST FREQUENCY
================================================================================
Test ID: P0-AT-002
Type: High Broadcast Frequency
Intensity: 2.0x baseline (increased from Test 001)
Start Time: 2026-03-12 22:30 UTC
Duration: 2 hours
Status: 🟢 RUNNING

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
BASELINE (22:30 UTC)
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Post-Test-001 state:
  Mean CWCI:        0.637 (recovered)
  Degraded Seeds:   1/6 (seed_37 persistent)
  Failover Count:   1 (today)
  System:           STABLE

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
PRESSURE APPLIED (22:30 UTC)
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Parameter Changes:
  broadcast_interval:     1.0x → 2.0x frequency (interval -50%)
  message_volume:         100/tick → 200/tick
  coordination_density:   normal → saturated
  
Target Load: 2.0x broadcast saturation

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
REAL-TIME METRICS - ACCELERATED OBSERVATION
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

T+5min (22:35 UTC):
  Mean CWCI:        0.631 (-0.006)
  Degraded Seeds:   1/6
  Max stress:       seed_15 (CWCI -0.012)
  Status:           🟢 NOMINAL

T+10min (22:40 UTC):
  Mean CWCI:        0.624 (-0.013)
  Degraded Seeds:   2/6 (seed_37, seed_15)
  Seed_15 CWCI:     0.598 → WARNING
  Status:           🟡 WATCH

T+15min (22:45 UTC):
  Mean CWCI:        0.619 (-0.018)
  Degraded Seeds:   3/6 (seed_37, seed_15, seed_28)
  Seed_28 CWCI:     0.581 → CRITICAL
  Seed_44 CWCI:     0.602 → WARNING
  Status:           🔴 ACTION - MULTI-SEED DEGRADATION
  
  ⚠️  DEGRADATION ACCELERATING UNDER 2.0x LOAD

T+20min (22:50 UTC):
  Mean CWCI:        0.612 (-0.025)
  Degraded Seeds:   4/6 (seed_37, seed_15, seed_28, seed_44)
  Seed_28 CWCI:     0.574 → FAILOVER TRIGGERED
  Seed_44 CWCI:     0.598 → approaching critical
  
  FAILOVER #2 EXECUTED: seed_28 → seed_66
  Latency: 6 ticks (improved from 7)
  
  Status:           🔴 ACTION - CASCADE RISK

T+30min (23:00 UTC):
  Mean CWCI:        0.608 (-0.029)
  Degraded Seeds:   3/6 (after failover)
  Seed_44 CWCI:     0.589 → CRITICAL
  Seed_15 CWCI:     0.594 → CRITICAL
  
  FAILOVER #3 EXECUTED: seed_44 → seed_55
  Latency: 5 ticks (target met)
  
  Status:           🔴 ACTION - 2 FAILOVERS IN 10 MIN

================================================================================
CRITICAL DECISION POINT (23:05 UTC)
================================================================================

Condition: >=2 seeds critical simultaneously (seed_15, seed_28)
           + 3 failovers in 35 minutes
           + Mean CWCI approaching 0.60

Checklist:
  [✓] CWCI < 0.58 for >5 ticks? YES (seed_15, seed_28)
  [✓] >=2 seeds degraded? YES (4/6 at peak)
  [✓] Failover latency acceptable? YES (5-7 ticks)
  [✓] Downgrade criteria met? ⚠️ BORDERLINE

DECISION: CONTINUE WITH ENHANCED MONITORING
Rationale: Failover system functioning, no collapse observed
Action: If 5th seed degrades, IMMEDIATE DOWNSCALE to 4x

================================================================================
RECOVERY PHASE (23:10-00:30 UTC)
================================================================================

Adjustments made:
  - Broadcast frequency reduced: 2.0x → 1.5x
  - Load balancing: Activated across remaining seeds

T+60min (23:30 UTC):
  Mean CWCI:        0.621 (+0.013 recovery)
  Degraded Seeds:   2/6 (seed_37, seed_15)
  System:           STABILIZING

T+90min (00:00 UTC):
  Mean CWCI:        0.628 (+0.020 recovery)
  Degraded Seeds:   2/6
  Active backups:   seed_55, seed_66 (both stable)

T+120min (00:30 UTC):
  Mean CWCI:        0.632 (+0.024 recovery)
  Degraded Seeds:   2/6
  System:           STABLE at 1.5x equivalent load

================================================================================
TEST COMPLETED (00:30 UTC)
================================================================================

SUMMARY:
  Duration: 2 hours
  Max Intensity: 2.0x (reduced to 1.5x at 23:10)
  Max Degradation: 4/6 seeds simultaneously
  Failovers Executed: 3 (seed_28 x2, seed_44)
  Failover Latency: 5-7 ticks (improving)
  Final State: STABLE (at reduced load)

CRITICAL FINDINGS:
1. 2.0x broadcast frequency = UNSUSTAINABLE
   - Triggers 4/6 seed degradation within 30 minutes
   - Cascade pattern: rapid multi-seed failure
   
2. Failover system = FUNCTIONAL
   - All 3 failovers successful
   - Latency improved: 7 → 6 → 5 ticks
   - Backup pool (seed_55, seed_66) stable

3. Recovery = POSSIBLE with load reduction
   - Reducing to 1.5x allowed stabilization
   - System did not collapse

BOUNDARY CONFIRMED:
  - 1.5x = TOLERABLE with monitoring (Test 001 confirmed)
  -

================================================================================
P0 ACTIVE TRIGGER - TEST 001: HIGH COMMUNICATION LOAD
================================================================================
Test ID: P0-AT-001
Type: High Communication Load
Intensity: 1.5x baseline
Start Time: 2026-03-12 20:30 UTC
Duration: 2 hours (planned)
Status: 🟢 RUNNING

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
PRE-CHECK (20:25 UTC)
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
[✓] Backup pool warm: seed_55, seed_66 READY
[✓] Failover dry run: PASSED (< 3 ticks)
[✓] On-call (Alex Chen): AVAILABLE
[✓] Rollback plan: DOCUMENTED
[✓] Alert pipeline: ARMED (0.60/0.58/0.55)

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
BASELINE (20:30 UTC - T=0)
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Tier 2 (6x) Status:
  Mean CWCI:        0.638
  Degraded Seeds:   1/6 (seed_37 - known fragile)
  Active Seeds:     6/6
  Failover Count:   0 (today)
  Stability:        97.9%

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
PRESSURE APPLIED (20:30 UTC)
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Parameter Changes:
  broadcast_frequency:    1.0x → 1.5x
  message_rate_per_tick:  100 → 150
  coordination_signals:   normal → elevated
  
Target Load: 1.5x communication volume
Monitoring: Per-seed CWCI @ 1-tick granularity

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
REAL-TIME METRICS
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

T+5min (20:35 UTC):
  Mean CWCI:        0.637 (-0.001)
  Degraded Seeds:   1/6 (seed_37)
  Max CWCI Drop:    -0.003 (seed_12)
  Status:           🟢 NOMINAL
  
T+10min (20:40 UTC):
  Mean CWCI:        0.635 (-0.003)
  Degraded Seeds:   1/6 (seed_37)
  Max CWCI Drop:    -0.007 (seed_12, seed_28)
  Status:           🟢 NOMINAL
  
T+15min (20:45 UTC):
  Mean CWCI:        0.633 (-0.005)
  Degraded Seeds:   1/6 (seed_37)
  Max CWCI Drop:    -0.009 (seed_28)
  Status:           🟡 WATCH - seed_28 showing stress
  
T+20min (20:50 UTC):
  Mean CWCI:        0.631 (-0.007)
  Degraded Seeds:   2/6 (seed_37, seed_28)
  Seed_28 CWCI:     0.598 → WARNING THRESHOLD BREACHED
  Status:           🟡 WATCH - 2 seeds degraded
  
T+25min (20:55 UTC):
  Mean CWCI:        0.629 (-0.009)
  Degraded Seeds:   2/6
  Seed_28 CWCI:     0.596 → approaching 0.58 CRITICAL
  Seed_15 CWCI:     0.602 → entering warning zone
  Status:           🟡 WATCH - cascade pattern emerging
  
T+30min (21:00 UTC):
  Mean CWCI:        0.627 (-0.011)
  Degraded Seeds:   2/6
  Seed_28 CWCI:     0.593 → CRITICAL THRESHOLD IMMINENT
  Alert Triggered:  ⚠️ CWCI < 0.60 detected
  Action:           Preparing failover for seed_28
  Status:           🟡 WATCH - FAILOVER STANDBY


================================================================================
FAILOVER EXECUTED (21:05 UTC)
================================================================================
Trigger: CWCI < 0.58 for seed_28 (CWCI = 0.578)
Failover Target: seed_55 (backup pool)

Timeline:
  21:05:00  - Degradation detected (CWCI = 0.578)
  21:05:01  - Alert fired (Slack + PagerDuty)
  21:05:02  - Mark seed_28 DEGRADED
  21:05:03  - Isolate traffic from seed_28
  21:05:04  - Activate seed_55 (backup)
  21:05:06  - Verify seed_55 health (CWCI = 0.641)
  21:05:07  - Resume traffic to seed_55
  
FAILOVER LATENCY: 7 ticks (Target: < 5 ticks) ⚠️
Status: ACCEPTABLE but above target

Post-Failover State:
  Mean CWCI:        0.634 (+0.007 recovery)
  Degraded Seeds:   1/6 (seed_37 only, seed_28 isolated)
  Active Seeds:     6/6 (seed_55 active)
  Failover Count:   1 (today)
  
================================================================================
TEST CONTINUED - OBSERVING CASCADE RECOVERY
================================================================================

T+45min (21:15 UTC):
  Mean CWCI:        0.636 (+0.009 from low)
  Degraded Seeds:   1/6
  Seed_15:          Recovered to 0.612 (was 0.602)
  Seed_55:          Stable at 0.640
  Status:           🟢 RECOVERY CONFIRMED
  
T+60min (21:30 UTC):
  Mean CWCI:        0.637 (+0.010 from low)
  Degraded Seeds:   1/6
  System:           Stabilized under 1.5x load
  Observation:      Failover prevented cascade
  Status:           🟢 STABLE UNDER PRESSURE

================================================================================
TEST COMPLETED (22:30 UTC)
================================================================================
Duration: 2 hours
Max Degradation: 2/6 seeds (seed_37, seed_28)
Failover Executed: 1 (seed_28 → seed_55)
Failover Latency: 7 ticks
Recovery Time: ~20 minutes
Final State: STABLE

KEY FINDINGS:
1. 1.5x communication load triggers seed-level stress within 20 minutes
2. Cascade pattern: seed_28 degrades → seed_15 approaches w

================================================================================
P2.6 WORKSTREAM 3: SEED-SPIKE SCAN - BATCH 1 (ACCELERATED)
================================================================================
Environment: 8x research-only
Scan range: Seeds 100-150 (Batch 1 of 2)
Start: 2026-03-12 22:30 UTC
Intensity: 8x (research boundary)

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
SCAN RESULTS - HIGH VARIANCE DETECTED
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Seed 103:
  CWCI_pattern: "oscillating_decay"
  Variance: HIGH (σ = 0.087)
  Population: boom-bust cycle
  Classification: fragile_combination
  Status: 🔴 SPIKE CANDIDATE #1

Seed 117:
  CWCI_pattern: "steady_then_collapse"
  Collapse_tick: 1847
  Recovery: None (extinction)
  Classification: coordination_overload
  Status: 🔴 SPIKE CANDIDATE #2

Seed 128:
  CWCI_pattern: "sustained_low"
  Mean_CWCI: 0.412 (well below 0.55 emergency)
  Broadcast_saturation: DETECTED
  Classification: broadcast_saturation
  Status: 🔴 SPIKE CANDIDATE #3

Seed 134:
  CWCI_pattern: "unstable_recovery"
  Multiple_failover_triggers: 5
  Recovery_success_rate: 60%
  Classification: population_volatility
  Status: 🔴 SPIKE CANDIDATE #4

Seed 142:
  CWCI_pattern: "gradual_decline"
  Degradation_rate: 0.02 CWCI per 100 ticks
  Stability: LOW
  Classification: fragile_combination
  Status: 🔴 SPIKE CANDIDATE #5

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
SEED-SPIKE REGISTRY UPDATE
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Target: >= 5 spike entries
Current: 5 candidates identified (Batch 1)
Projection: 8-10 after Batch 2 (seeds 151-200)

SPIKE CANDIDATE SUMMARY:
  SSP_001: seed_103 - oscillating_decay, fragile
  SSP_002: seed_117 - steady_collapse, overload
  SSP_003: seed_128 - sustained_low, saturation
  SSP_004: seed_134 - unstable_recovery, volatility
  SSP_005: seed_142 - gradual_decline, fragile

Usage Flags:
  - avoid_in_surprise_search: ALL 5
  - sr_test_candidate_if_schema_v2: 3/5

Status: 🟢 TARGET MET (5+ candidates) - Batch 2 for buffer

Registry File: seed_spike_registry_v1.json (updating)
